INSERT DATA { :s1 a Class1; :name 'Subject 1' . :s2 a Class1; :name 'Subject 2' . :s3 a Class2; :name 'Subject 3' . };
SELECT ?s WHERE { ?s a ?class . { SELECT Class2 AS ?class } };
SELECT ?s WHERE { ?s a Class1 . { SELECT ?s2 WHERE { ?s2 a Class2 . } } };
SELECT DISTINCT ?s WHERE { ?s a Class2 . ?s a Class1 . };
SELECT ?s WHERE { ?s a Class1 . ?s a Class2 . };
SELECT ?s WHERE { ?s a Class1 . BIND(CONCAT(STR(?s), ' is a Class1') AS ?label) . };
SELECT ?s WHERE { ?s a Class1 . FILTER regex(?s, 'Subject') };
